descriptions.text: SM64 The Dark Stars is a ROM hack created by Caasje, with 75 Stars and 10 main courses. This hack is fairly challenging with a wide variety of missions set to hard difficulty until the later courses become much more puzzling and trickier. The courses don't have a special Star requiring to collect 100 coins, in addition, there are extra content such as hidden signs, shortcuts, and secret endings to find as a case of easter eggs.
